title: Support for --top-module overriding toplevel modules within a file

features.name: module instantiation inside if-0 block
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation statement wrapped inside an if (0) block, which creates dead code that prevents the module from being considered a top-level module

features.name: module name concatenation for abstract wrapper
features.description: Code should include a module name created via macro concatenation that wraps an existing module in an abstract module pattern with if (0) instantiation
features.snippet: `define BSG_ABSTRACT_MODULE(fn) module fn``__abstract(); if (0) fn not_used(); endmodule

features.name: top-module flag override for instantiated module
features.description: Code should include a module that is instantiated within another module but designated as top-level via --top-module command line flag
